error_signature: unable to reply to previous email
title: Unable to reply to previous email in GoHighLevel
symptom: When attempting to reply to an email using the HTTP request in GoHighLevel, the message is sent as a new email instead of a reply. Including the message ID or thread ID results in an error.
applies_when: Using GoHighLevel HTTP request to send emails
Trying to reply to an existing email thread
not_this_if: Sending a new email without referencing a previous thread
root_cause: The GoHighLevel webhook does not provide the necessary message ID or thread ID for replies, leading to confusion when trying to reference previous emails. The IDs used in Gmail may not match those in GoHighLevel, causing errors when included in the request.
fix_steps: Use the contactId and locationId from the webhook payload to fetch the messageId using the HighLevel API.
Make an API call to 'Export messages by location ID' with the retrieved locationId and contactId to get the messageId.
Use the retrieved messageId to send the reply through the HTTP request.
agent_instruction: Fetch the messageId using the contactId and locationId from the webhook payload before sending the reply.
